title: trifolium hybridum subsp. fistulosum
intro: Trifolium hybridum subsp. fistulosum, also known as big trefoil or greater hop trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of big trefoil include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Big trefoil can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
